ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the conference or workshop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the conference is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the conference (e.g., Planning, Active, Completed) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the conference website */,
  "organizing_committee" TEXT /* List of key members of the organizing committee */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the conference */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated conference */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Speaker, Plenary) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room or venue where the session will be held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the session */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Whether registration is required for the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the speaker is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's profile photo */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Speaker's Twitter handle */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* Speaker's LinkedIn profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated conference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering for the conference */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Pending) */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., Early Bird, Standard, On-site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attendee, speaker, organizer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which feedback is given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the session */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_speakers" (
  "session_speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-speaker relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a session */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a speaker */,
  "presentation_title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker's presentation */,
  "presentation_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the speaker's presentation */,
  "presentation_material_url" TEXT /* URL to the presentation materials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_speakers_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_speakers_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Education, Research) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon representing the session type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code used to visually represent the session type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Attendee, Speaker, Organizer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon representing the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the organizer */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference organized */,
  "organizer_role" TEXT /* Role of the organizer (e.g., Lead Organizer, Co-Organizer) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organizer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizers_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_dates" (
  "event_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event date */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated conference */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Registration Deadline, Conference Date) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_dates_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)
